reviews.comment:
La atención es muy buena muy amable las nafta de ypf últimamente no es buena pero como tengo ruta solo cargo en ypf

(Translated by Google)
The service is very good, very friendly. The gas at YPF hasn't been great lately, but since I have a long route, I only fill up at YPF.

reviews.comment:
Los tiempos de espera en esta estación de servicio son absolutamente ridículos. No importa a qué hora es, siempre hay 3 autos en fila mínimo y se tarda aprox 30' en cargar. Si, más de 8' minutos por auto. Consigan más empleados o empleados con más ganas de moverse. Esto ocurre a las 9, las 15, las 23, las 3, en todos los horarios. Es más rápido irse a Azurduy y volver. Malísimo.

(Translated by Google)
The wait times at this gas station are absolutely ridiculous. No matter what time it is, there are always at least three cars in line, and it takes approximately 30 minutes to fill up. Yes, more than eight minutes per car. Get more employees or employees who are more willing to move. This happens at 9 a.m., 3 p.m., 11 p.m., 3 a.m., at all hours. It's faster to go to Azurduy and come back. Terrible.
reviews.name: accounts/109853746269412609224/locations/4834150439448216609/reviews/ChZDSUhNMG9nS0VJQ0FnSUNwaFlTeFpREAE

reviews.comment:
es completa solo porque esta el comedero anexado de la estación y que es caro. El Full de YPF es un container tipo carrito, no muy recomendable

(Translated by Google)
It's only considered complete because it includes the station's attached food stand, which is expensive. The YPF "Full" station is a container-type cart, not highly recommended.
